---
title: "Luftkvalitet i snickeriet"
subtitle: "Mätning vid justersågen"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r paket}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

library(ggplot2)
library(hms)
library(scales)
library(forecast)
library(slider)
library(plotly)
library(lubridate)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
library(knitr)
```

```{r define_variables}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| cache: true
#| include: false

tz_local <- "Europe/Stockholm"
epoch_col <- "epoch"
summary_date <- NULL
node_pick <- c("node-1","node-2", "node-3")
topic_pick <- "sensors_pms5003_node-2_sensor_pms_pm2_5_state"
log_dir <- Sys.getenv("PMS_LOG_DIR", unset = "../pms_logs")

if (!nzchar(log_dir)) {
  log_dir <- "../pms_logs"
}
```


```{r load_tables}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

load_node_tables <- function(log_dir = NULL, target_date = NULL) {
  if (is.null(log_dir) || !nzchar(log_dir)) {
    log_dir <- Sys.getenv("PMS_LOG_DIR", unset = NA)
  }

  if (is.na(log_dir) || !nzchar(log_dir)) {
    log_dir <- "~/pms_logs"
  }

  log_dir <- path.expand(log_dir)

  if (!dir.exists(log_dir)) {
    message("Log directory not found: ", shQuote(log_dir))
    return(list())
  }

  pattern <- if (!is.null(target_date)) {
    paste0("__", target_date, "\\.csv$")
  } else {
    "__\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}\\.csv$"
  }

  files <- list.files(log_dir, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE)

  if (length(files) == 0) {
    message("No log files found in: ", shQuote(log_dir))
    return(list())
  }

  parse_topic <- function(safe_topic) {
    m <- regexec("^sensors_pms5003_(node-[^_]+)_sensor_(.*)_state$", safe_topic)
    parts <- regmatches(safe_topic, m)[[1]]

    if (length(parts) >= 3) {
      return(list(node = parts[2], metric = parts[3]))
    }

    list(node = NA_character_, metric = NA_character_)
  }

  node_tables <- list()

  for (f in files) {
    df <- tryCatch(
      read.csv(f, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
      error = function(e) {
        message("Could not read file: ", shQuote(f))
        message("Reason: ", conditionMessage(e))
        return(NULL)
      }
    )

    if (is.null(df)) {
      next
    }

    if (!all(c("epoch", "value") %in% names(df))) {
      if (ncol(df) >= 2) {
        names(df)[1:2] <- c("epoch", "value")
      } else {
        message("Skipping file with too few columns: ", shQuote(f))
        next
      }
    }

    df$epoch <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df$epoch))
    df$value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df$value))
    df <- df[is.finite(df$epoch) & is.finite(df$value), , drop = FALSE]

    if (nrow(df) == 0) {
      next
    }

    base <- basename(f)
    date_tag <- sub(".*__(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2})\\.csv$", "\\1", base)
    safe_topic <- sub("__\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}\\.csv$", "", base)
    meta <- parse_topic(safe_topic)

    if (is.na(meta$node) || is.na(meta$metric)) {
      message("Skipping file with unrecognized topic pattern: ", shQuote(base))
      next
    }

    out <- data.frame(
      date = date_tag,
      epoch = df$epoch,
      value = df$value,
      metric = meta$metric,
      topic = safe_topic,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    if (is.null(node_tables[[meta$node]])) {
      node_tables[[meta$node]] <- out
    } else {
      node_tables[[meta$node]] <- rbind(node_tables[[meta$node]], out)
    }
  }

  node_tables
}


```

```{r load_time_conversion}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

time_conversion <- function(.data) {
  .data %>%
    mutate(
      date_time = as_datetime(.data[[epoch_col]], tz = tz_local),
      time = hms::as_hms(date_time)
    )
}

```


```{r node_data}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| dependson: [settings, load_time_conversion]

node_tables <- tryCatch(
  load_node_tables(log_dir = log_dir, target_date = summary_date),
  error = function(e) {
    message("Kunde inte läsa loggdata: ", conditionMessage(e))
    list()
  }
)

has_tables <- length(node_tables) > 0
```

```{r load_functions}

#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| dependson: [load_tables, load_time_conversion]

if (!has_tables) {
  cat("## Ingen loggdata tillgänglig\n\n")
  cat("Renderingen kördes utan åtkomst till loggfiler.\n\n")
  cat("Kontrollera miljövariabeln `PMS_LOG_DIR` eller lägg loggar i rätt katalog.\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}

```

```{r build_node_data}

#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| dependson: [load_tables, load_functions, load_time_conversion]

node_data <- tryCatch(
  node_tables %>%
    map(time_conversion) %>%
    bind_rows(.id = "node"),
  error = function(e) {
    message("Kunde inte bearbeta noddata: ", conditionMessage(e))
    tibble()
  }
)

has_node_data <- nrow(node_data) > 0

```


```{r if_no_data}

#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| dependson: build_node_data

if (!has_node_data) {
  cat("## Ingen användbar data tillgänglig\n\n")
  cat("Loggfiler hittades, men kunde inte bearbetas till ett användbart dataformat.\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}
```



```{r prepare_plot_data}

#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| dependson: build_node_data

plot_data <- node_data %>%
  filter(node == node_pick, topic == topic_pick) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date_time, tz = tz_local)) %>%
  arrange(date, date_time) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  mutate(
    ma_workday = slide_dbl(
      value,
      .f = ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
      .before = 480,
      .complete = FALSE
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

has_plot_data <- nrow(plot_data) > 0

```


```{r}

#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| dependson: prepare_plot_data

if (!has_plot_data) {
  cat("## Ingen data för valt urval\n\n")
  cat("Det finns loggfiler, men ingen data matchade vald nod och topic.\n\n")
  cat(paste0("- Nod: `", node_pick, "`\n"))
  cat(paste0("- Topic: `", topic_pick, "`\n"))
  knitr::knit_exit()
}

```

```{r}
#| label: date_calc
#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| dependson: prepare_plot_data

dates <- sort(unique(plot_data$date))

if (length(dates) == 0 || all(is.na(dates))) {
  cat("## Inga giltiga datum hittades\n\n")
  cat("Plotdata skapades, men innehöll inga användbara datumvärden.\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}

latest_date <- max(dates, na.rm = TRUE)
latest_index <- which(dates == latest_date)[1]
```


```{r data_summary}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

cat("## Översikt\n\n")
cat(paste0("Visar glidande medelvärde för PM2.5 för nod `", node_pick, "`.\n\n"))
cat(paste0("Antal dagar i urvalet: **", length(dates), "**\n\n"))
cat(paste0("Senaste dag i data: **", latest_date, "**\n"))

```


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

p <- plot_ly()

for (i in seq_along(dates)) {
  d <- dates[i]
  df_day <- plot_data %>% filter(date == d)

  p <- add_lines(
    p,
    data = df_day,
    x = ~date_time,
    y = ~ma_workday,
    name = as.character(d),
    visible = isTRUE(all.equal(d, latest_date))
  )
}

buttons <- lapply(seq_along(dates), function(i) {
  d <- dates[i]
  df_day <- plot_data %>% filter(date == d)

  x_range <- c(min(df_day$date_time, na.rm = TRUE), max(df_day$date_time, na.rm = TRUE))
  vis <- rep(FALSE, length(dates))
  vis[i] <- TRUE

  list(
    method = "update",
    args = list(
      list(visible = vis),
      list(
        title = paste("Dag:", d),
        xaxis = list(range = x_range)
      )
    ),
    label = as.character(d)
  )
})

p %>%
  layout(
    title = paste("Dag:", latest_date),
    xaxis = list(
      title = "Tid",
      tickformat = "%H:%M"
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      title = "PM2.5 mg/m3 luft",
      range = c(0, 20)
    ),
    shapes = list(
      list(
        type = "line",
        xref = "paper",
        x0 = 0,
        x1 = 1,
        y0 = 2,
        y1 = 2,
        line = list(color = "red")
      )
    ),
    updatemenus = list(
      list(
        type = "dropdown",
        active = latest_index - 1,
        buttons = buttons
      )
    )
  )
```
